pi_items.source: Task specification consistent with KML standard naming convention
Task specification - standard Windows Documents folder path for Docker user
Web search confirmed these are the official GPS coordinates for Los Angeles (https://latitude.to/map/us/united-states/cities/los-angeles)

Task specification - consistent with Los Angeles area geography
Task specification - consistent with Los Angeles area geography (northeast of downtown)
Task specification - consistent with Los Angeles area geography
NOAA CAMEO Chemicals database confirms CAS 7664-41-7 for Anhydrous Ammonia (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/4860)
NOAA CAMEO Chemicals database and NIOSH confirm CAS 7782-50-5 for Chlorine (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/2862)
Tolerance value (~220 meters at equator, ~185 meters longitude at LA latitude) is reasonable for 4-decimal place coordinates
EPA website confirms CAMEO Data Manager is real software (https://www.epa.gov/cameo/cameo-data-manager-software)
NOAA announcement confirms CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 was released in December 2025 (https://content.govdelivery.com/accounts/USNOAANOS/bulletins/40035e7)

pi_items.metadata_value: Task expects KML export from CAMEO Data Manager
pi_items.verified_value: KML export not explicitly documented for CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1; documented exports are CSV and PDF
pi_items.source: EPA and NOAA documentation show CSV and PDF export capabilities, but KML export not explicitly mentioned

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a chemical facility map in CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 (EPA/NOAA software released December 2025) with three facilities: Westside Cold Storage at 34.0522°N, -118.2437°W (Los Angeles downtown coordinates), Eastside Water Treatment at 34.0953°N, -118.2801°W, and Northside Ice & Fuel at 34.1490°N, -118.3490°W. The chemicals are Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7) stored at two facilities and Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) at one facility. The output should be an ammonia_map.kml file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ammonia_map.kml containing only the two ammonia facilities (Westside and Northside) with a coordinate tolerance of 0.002 degrees.
